new_rule: Two linked products: randomized comparative effect and descriptive monitored-exposure inventory
All-cause SAE leads; attribution-based SAE becomes secondary
Prospective nonrandomized cohorts enter Product B only
rationale: Improves rare-event detection without contaminating Product A

new_rule: Focused plus broad psilocybin safety-capture search; no harms filter
rationale: Harms and companion reports may be poorly indexed
True blinding to public trial results is impossible
Whole outcomes and studies may be absent
Captures distressing and functional harms not defined by seriousness

new_rule: Add AI assistance and human accountability statement
rationale: Required for transparency and role integrity
